---
title: "Copy Text Extension - Examples"
format:
  html:
    css: _extensions/copy-text/copy-text.css
    include-after-body: _extensions/copy-text/copy-logic.html
filters:
  - copy-text
---

# Copy Text Extension Demo

This document demonstrates the `copy-text` Quarto extension. Each copyable section has a light gray background with a "Copy" button in the top-right corner. Click any "Copy" button to copy the content to your clipboard!

## Basic Text

::: copy
This is a simple paragraph that can be copied with a single click.
:::

## Formatted Content

::: copy
**Bold text**, *italic text*, and [clickable links](https://quarto.org) all copy with their formatting preserved.
:::

## Use Cases

Perfect for blog posts where you want readers to share pre-written content:

::: copy

Positron Notebook Editor (alpha) is here! Custom-built Jupyter experience with batteries-included IDE features + context-aware AI. No extensions needed. Built for data science from the ground up. <https://posit.co/blog/announcing-the-positron-notebook-editor/>

:::

Make installation commands easy to copy:

::: copy
`pip install great-tables`
:::
